rejection_reasons.detail: Population slot zero was exactly the pre-existing expressiveness witness: press button 0x0100 for one frame at suffix frame 100. This proves execution, not search competence.
The checked optimizer does not contain the generation-zero cadence injection that created this candidate.
Only one native evaluation exists; there is no five-replay promotion proof.

allowed_claims: The native evaluator observed the Ordon terminal predicate at tick 125 for the known one-frame repair.
The remaining categorical candidates produced varied success and miss outcomes.
forbidden_claims: Independent sampling closed the degraded canary.
The result is promotable or deterministic across cold replay.
